title: Experience
subTitle: Production SaaS, real-time crypto data, and enterprise communications—shipping end-to-end from UI through APIs, data stores, and cloud deploys.

highlights: The Tie Terminal — screeners, watchlists, alerts, and AI-assisted dashboards for institutional crypto clients.
Vue 3 / Nuxt 3 + Ruby on Rails + PostgreSQL + Elasticsearch; Core Web Vitals and heavy grid UX.
Realtime alerts (Discord, Telegram, email, on-site), WebSockets, GitHub Actions, Docker, AWS (Lambda, EC2, RDS).
Hotel management SaaS on Ruby on Rails — bookings, payments, multi-role access, REST integrations.
Query and indexing work across MySQL and PostgreSQL to cut latency on reporting paths.
MongoDB/Firebase integrations and automation with Python Selenium / MS Web Scraper.

roles.location: Lahore, Pakistan · Remote & on-site with clients
highlights: Cross-platform desktop apps with Electron.js for local businesses.
Barcode scanning and point-of-sale (POS) flows in Flutter.
Model training and fine-tuning for Roman Urdu text—including dataset work from reading papers and coordinating with authors across roughly 50 research publications.
